top.title: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
top.summary: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.

top.title: Epstein housed abuse victims in London flats, BBC reveals
top.summary: The revelations intensify concerns about repeated police decisions not to investigate 2015 trafficking claims.

top.title: Kenyan leader sparks uproar after  mocking Nigerians' spoken English
top.summary: William Ruto says Kenyans speak "some of the best English in the world" while it is hard to understand Nigerians.

top.title: Meta to cut one in 10 jobs after spending billions on AI
top.summary: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.

top.title: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
top.summary: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.

top.title: From scientist to silk farmer: India's silk industry renewal
top.summary: Silk production is an increasingly high-tech business in India.
